title: PIP Progress Document
description: The single source of truth for the PIP Progress Tracker (progress.json). Renders and rolls up entirely from this document; the app hardcodes no goal content.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of the data shape.

checkpoints.description: Ordered biweekly checkpoints. Exactly 8, 14 days apart, 2026-07-15 to 2026-10-15.

progressValue.description: A recorded progress value, 0-100 (stored unrounded; slider step is 5).

lastUpdated.description: Stamped on export with the current date.

id.description: Stable identifier; used as the key in task.progressByCheckpoint.

weight.description: Roll-up weight among goals; defaults to equal weighting when absent.

status.description: Author hint only; displayed badge is derived from computed progress.

placeholder.description: true until sourced; placeholder goals have empty subGoals, render 0% and contribute 0% to roll-up while still weighted equally.

subGoals.description: May be empty for a placeholder goal.

weight.description: Weight within the parent goal; simple average when siblings lack weights.

tasks.description: May be empty; an empty sub-goal rolls up to 0%.

resourceUrl.description: Opens in a new tab on user click only.

weight.description: Weight within the sub-goal; defaults to 1 (equal average) when absent.

progressByCheckpoint.description: Sparse map of checkpoint id -> progress value. Gaps are filled by carry-forward at render time.
